name: German Chocolate Pie (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a medium saucepan over very low heat, melt the chocolate and butter.
3. Add the evaporated milk, coconut, sugar, and eggs to the saucepan.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve the pie warm or at room temperature. Top with vanilla ice cream if desired.
Each serving (without the Vanilla Ice Cream) contains:
Calories: 446
Protein: 9 g
Fat: 28 g
Carbohydrates: 70 g
